political.s: No FEC PAC contributions on record.  [CA CalAccess + NY COELIG + TX Ethics adds state-level totals.]

charity.s: $130M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.14% of revenue) via Citi Foundation. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #36 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment.
charity.focus: Economic development, financial inclusion, youth opportunity, community development

dei.s: HRC Corporate Equality Index: 100/100 — Equality 100 Leader (2025). Top-rated LGBTQ+ workplace policies, benefits, and culture. JUST Capital JUST 100 — ranked #36 of Russell 1000 (2025) for treatment of workers, customers, communities, environment. Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index member (2024) — transparent on female leadership, equal pay, inclusive culture. As You Sow Gender Equality Funds — first major US bank to publish raw pay gap data. [as-you-sow-funds] HRC Corporate Equality Index 100/100 (2025) — top-tier LGBTQ+ workplace equality rating.

privacy.s: CFPB consumer complaints: 153921 on record (100 in past 12mo); 100% timely response rate.

execPay.s: UK FCA enforcement — £27.77M FCA fine (May 2024) for trading-system control failures that allowed a $1.4B fat-finger error to reach the market.

wiki.hq: 388 Greenwich Street, Citigroup Center, New York City
wiki.industry: financial services, bank, International Standard Industrial Classification, financial service activities, except insurance and pension funding
wiki.extract: Citigroup Inc. or Citi is an American multinational investment bank and financial services company based in New York City. The company was formed in 1998 by the merger of Citicorp, the bank holding company for Citibank, and Travelers; Travelers was spun off from the company in 2002.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level  6 to 30 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was working on the construction of a bridge when an orange cone fell where the bridge was going to be placed. The employee went to remove it and fell through a gap approximately 9 feet to the ground. The employee was hospitalized with fractures to her ankle and arm.
An employee was unplugging a vacuum cleaner she was using to vacuum the floor when she fell over, resulting in a fractured left femur. The employee was hospitalized for surgery.

sampleRecords.employer: Centennial Contractors of the Quad Cities, Inc.
sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle backing up in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On June 12, 2024, an employee was hand grading behind an excavator with rubber tracks and tripped and fell while the machine was backing up. The excavator ran over the employee's right leg resulting in a broken ankle, cracked pelvis and a fractured left arm.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level while climbing stairs, steps, or curbs
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee tripped on a step while entering a house. The employee suffered a broken right femur and was hospitalized, requiring surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall or jump from vehicle in normal operation, nonroadway
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was driving a golf cart when he fell out and struck his head, resulting in a head injury.
